testimonials.name: Aditya Sharma
testimonials.text: Mukund is an incredibly talented developer with a sharp eye for detail. His AI projects and clean code quality stood out. Highly recommend connecting with him!

testimonials.name: Priya Desai
testimonials.text: I read Mukund's blog posts on Gemini API and Vertex AI — extremely well-written and insightful. He explains complex concepts in a very accessible way.

testimonials.name: Rahul Patil
testimonials.text: Worked alongside Mukund on a college project. His problem-solving skills and ability to learn new technologies quickly is impressive. A great team player!

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Designed and developed a modern, responsive portfolio using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and Tailwind CSS. Integrated EmailJS for contact form functionality, Cloudflare for CDN & security, and GitHub Pages for hosting.

projects.title: Library Management System
projects.description: Built a Java-based library management system with MySQL database integration for efficient book tracking, member management, and transaction logging. Features include book search, issue/return records, and user authentication.

projects.title: Time Loop Game with Amazon-Q-CLI
projects.description: Developed a 2D puzzle platformer in Pygame featuring a unique time-loop mechanic where players interact with recordings of their past selves. Includes precise action syncing, modular architecture, and debugging tools enhanced by Amazon Q CLI.

projects.title: House Price Prediction Model
projects.description: Built a machine learning model to predict house prices, implementing an end-to-end pipeline from data cleaning and EDA to feature engineering. Applied regression algorithms and evaluated performance using MAE and R² metrics.

blog.title: From Curiosity to Capability: My Journey Through Google Cloud’s Gen AI Academy
blog.description: A recap of my hands-on learning experience with cutting-edge generative AI tools on Google Cloud.

blog.title: Building a Time Loop Puzzle Game with Python + Amazon Q CLI
blog.description: How I used AI and Python to design a replay-based puzzle game from concept to code.

blog.title: Exploring Generative AI with the Gemini API in Vertex AI
blog.description: Diving into the powerful capabilities of the Gemini API for generative AI tasks on Google Cloud.

blog.title: Inspecting Rich Documents with Gemini Multimodality and Multimodal RAG
blog.description: A look at using Gemini's multimodal features to analyze and understand complex documents.

blog.title: Build GenAI-Powered Web Apps with Gemini and Streamlit
blog.description: A guide to creating interactive web applications powered by Gemini's AI, using the Streamlit framework.

blog.title: Building Real-World AI Applications with Gemini and Imagen on Google Cloud
blog.description: Practical examples of developing applications with Gemini and Imagen on the Google Cloud platform.

blog.title: Mastering Prompt Design with Vertex AI: My Learning Journey
blog.description: Insights and key takeaways from learning advanced prompt engineering techniques with Vertex AI.
